figures.caption: Table 1. Gland segmentation performance in cross-validation (PI-CAI).

Figure 1. Qualitative comparison of prostate gland segmentation on the Hospital La Fe cohort. Each row corresponds to a different patient. From left to right: T2-weighted image, ground truth, proposed model, and TotalSegmentator. The slice was selected based on the ground truth mask (maximum voxel area). Dice scores are reported for the predicted segmentations.
